_comment: Per-vertical Application Approver IDs (AA-XXXXX) to add as sign-offs on the Release record. Get these from https://gus.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/ADM_Application__c/a2WB00000006F2ZMAU/related/Application_Approvers__r/view
_format_note: Each vertical maps to a list of Application Approver record IDs (the a2VEE... ID, not the AA-XXXXX name). Skill creates one ADM_Signoff__c per approver, linked to the Release.

CME._note: TODO: Add Application Approver IDs for CME sign-off

INS._note: TODO: Add Application Approver IDs for INS sign-off

OS._note: TODO: Add Application Approver IDs for OS sign-off

INS-FSC._note: TODO: Add Application Approver IDs for INS-FSC sign-off

_shared_approvers._note: Optional: approvers added for ALL verticals (e.g., Industries Shared Release Manager). Leave empty if none.
